title: Spend Management, Corporate Cards & Accounts Payable Solutions | Ramp
heroSubhead: Cards, expenses, bill payments, and banking* – in the blink of AI.
heroBannerAbove: Introducing Stack by Ramp — the AI operating system for accounting firms.
heroCounterLabel: US CORPORATE PAYMENTS PROCESSED BY RAMP:
heroForm: Email input + 'Get started for free' button

allHeadings.text: Join 70,000 of the world's most ambitious companies growing 3.2x faster than the average American business.

One platform for your entire back office.
Infinite agents that work 24/7.
Procure to pay without chasing approvals
Banking that flows money to the highest return
200+ Integrations to the tools you already use
Introducing Stack by Ramp. The AI operating system built for today's top accounting firms.
Keep your finance team focused on strategy. Let agents handle the busywork.
AI that learns from your team. Powered by 70,000 others that came before you.

Scale the team.
Shrink the paperwork.
One platform for all your global spend.

navBanner.note: very dark near-black top banner bar

fonts.note: Single typeface: Lausanne (custom/licensed). No serif or mono fonts detected on main content.

sections.gist: Hero: live counter 'US CORPORATE PAYMENTS PROCESSED BY RAMP', H1, subhead 'Cards, expenses, bill payments, and banking* – in the blink of AI.', email signup form. Hero has video + canvas elements.

sections.firstHeading: Join 70,000 of the world's most ambitious companies growing 3.2x faster than the average American business.
sections.gist: Live AI agent counters: AGENTS AT WORK TODAY, RECEIPTS PROCESSED (2.8M+), ACCOUNTING FIELDS CODED (1.8M+), AGENT INTERACTIONS (16k+), EXPENSES REVIEWED (143k+), SPEND ALLOCATED (28k+), INVOICES PROCESSED (79k+), VIOLATIONS CLASSIFIED (5.8k+), TOTAL AI ACTIONS (4.9M+). Customer logos: Perplexity, Webflow, Glossier, Shopify, Barry's. Social proof stat: 400hrs saved on expense reports.

sections.firstHeading: One platform for your entire back office. Infinite agents that work 24/7.
sections.gist: Product feature grid with 5 tabs/cards: Cards & Expenses, Procure to pay, Accounting automation, Banking, 200+ Integrations. Each links to dedicated product page. Animated UI demos embedded.
Animated diagram showing complexity of 5 separate legacy systems to reimburse a flight. Contrast narrative for Ramp consolidation pitch.

sections.firstHeading: Introducing Stack by Ramp. The AI operating system built for today's top accounting firms.
sections.gist: Stack product announcement with video play button. Quote from Tyler Otto, President of Specialized Accounting: 'Stack has finally automated what we all knew was coming with AI, but it did it in a reliable and consistent manner.'

sections.firstHeading: Keep your finance team focused on strategy. Let agents handle the busywork.
sections.gist: Ramp Intelligence / AI agents section. Quote from Lauren Feeney, Controller at Perplexity: 'Gone are the days of scrambling to chase receipts, manually coding really large data sets.' Video of Perplexity customer story.
sections.cta: Learn more about Ramp Intelligence → https://ramp.com/intelligence

sections.firstHeading: AI that learns from your team. Powered by 70,000 others that came before you.
sections.gist: Policy Agents / network-effect AI learning section. Quote from Neusha Sayadian, Fractional CFO at Valence: 'Ramp's AI just keeps getting smarter every week.'

sections.firstHeading: Scale the team. Shrink the paperwork.
sections.gist: Enterprise + Global spend section. Sub-cards: 'Set user access on autopilot' (Enterprise Solutions) + 'One platform for all your global spend' (30+ currencies, Global Spend Management). Visual: bill-creation workflow image + stippled globe.
subheads: Set user access on autopilot. Provision cards, permissions, and limits automatically based on role, location, department and custom fields.
One platform for all your global spend. Issue cards in 30+ currencies and reimburse employees in local currencies, including pounds, euros, yen, and pesos.

sections.gist: Social proof / testimonials wall. Eyebrow: '70,000 teams and counting'. Quotes from: Shannon McCormick (Notion), Heather Bruzus (Mindbody & ClassPass), Tzu-San Hung (Notion), Matteo Franceschetti (Eight Sleep CEO), Christine Mimnagh-Fleming (Shopify), Carey Peek (KIPP Nashville CFO), Mayor Neil Bradshaw (City of Ketchum), Bret Taylor (Sierra CEO), Michael Bohn (Foursquare), Ben Whipple (City of Ketchum), Michael Litwin (Virgin Voyages), Staci Robinson (Pair Eyewear), Irish Rose (Eight Sleep), Andrew Clarke (Studs), Jason Penegar (Boys & Girls Clubs), Sarah Bird (Seed Health), Carolynn Yipp (Poshmark).

testimonialQuotes.quote: As soon as I texted my first Ramp receipt, I realized Ramp is a game-changer. It's incredibly intuitive.
testimonialQuotes.title: International Workplace Experience Lead

testimonialQuotes.quote: We got positive feedback, which just doesn't happen very often. That proved this was the right decision.
testimonialQuotes.title: Principal Accountant

testimonialQuotes.quote: Ramp was a complete game changer. It's a single platform that can handle every aspect of our spending.
testimonialQuotes.title: CEO

testimonialQuotes.quote: Ramp is so intuitive, people get it right away.
testimonialQuotes.title: Sr. Manager, Finance Transformation

testimonialQuotes.quote: Implementing Ramp has been my biggest win as CFO. Employees love it and often go out of their way to tell me so.
testimonialQuotes.title: CFO

testimonialQuotes.quote: Ramp gives us the ability to make more informed financial policy decisions. It was one of the best decisions we've ever made.
testimonialQuotes.title: Mayor

testimonialQuotes.quote: It's almost like we're a more self-actualized company because everyone is just working on what we do differently.
testimonialQuotes.title: CEO

testimonialQuotes.quote: The average person can figure Ramp out without training. That's what drives 100% adoption.
testimonialQuotes.title: Head of Business Operations

testimonialQuotes.quote: I snap a picture of the receipt, Ramp handles the rest like magic, and I move on.
testimonialQuotes.title: Director of Public Works

testimonialQuotes.quote: Before Ramp it was a process from the dark ages. We had people just doing expenses full-time. It was miserable.
testimonialQuotes.title: VP Controller

testimonialQuotes.quote: Ramp's AI has given me a better work-life balance. I have more time for my family now that the AI handles much of the work I used to do manually.
testimonialQuotes.title: AP Manager

testimonialQuotes.quote: Closing the books with Ramp is effortless.
testimonialQuotes.title: Controller

testimonialQuotes.quote: We've consolidated four platforms into one with Ramp.
testimonialQuotes.title: SVP Finance

testimonialQuotes.quote: The Ramp journey has been incredible. A flawless implementation…
testimonialQuotes.title: VP Controller

testimonialQuotes.quote: It's rare to feel like a company and a team is a partner, and that they really want to understand what you need.
testimonialQuotes.title: Controller

testimonialQuotes.quote: It's very easy to use, very intuitive, and requires almost zero training.
testimonialQuotes.title: Assistant Controller

animLib: Custom canvas + CSS animations via Next.js (no third-party anim library detected on window; hero uses native <video> + <canvas> elements; 7 canvases, 3 videos total on page). Framework: Next.js (Turbopack build, _next/static/chunks pattern). Live counters implemented as animated number elements.

networkScriptMatches.note: No script URLs matching gsap|anime|framer|motion|lottie|lenis|webflow|three|splitting|barba|scrollmagic found in 97 network script requests.

imagery.notes: Hero section contains both video and canvas — custom animated background. SVGs used extensively for logos and icons. Customer logos: Perplexity, Webflow, Glossier, Shopify, Barry's (SVG/WebP).
